page_title: What if?: orchestra, choir and piano
text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 12 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287 

Lyrics

 
[Verse 1]
What if?
We just hadn't said goodbye?
Would your love now
Have been as good as mine?
Would I still think
Love is impossible to find?

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Would I still think
Love is impossible to find?

[Instrumental]

[Verse 3]
What if?
We just hadn't said goodbye?
Would your love now
Have been as good as mine?
Would I still think
Love is impossible to find?
